messages.content: how's your mom
Tired this week. Pulmonologist said the new inhaler is working. She still climbs the porch steps slowly.
talk to eleanor lately
Sunday call. She wanted to talk about Diane. They had a falling out about the church choir.
how's your mother holding up
Steady. Slow. She's been reading the Gilead i sent. Texted me a passage tuesday.
is your mom still in granbury
Yes. Same house. Same porch. Same metal chair she's had since i was nine.
have you been home recently
Two weeks ago. Stayed three nights. Walked the river twice with Eleanor.
how's eleanor's health
Better than march. Worse than two years ago. Still cooking for herself.
did you talk to your mom this week
Sunday. She mentioned the dogwood is blooming. That's how she opens.
what did your mom say
That she's tired. That Diane keeps calling. That the cat next door is fat.
how's your relationship with your mother now
Better than at twenty-five. Worse than at thirty. Steady right now.
is your mom doing okay
Mostly. Better days are still less than half.
is your mother still teaching
Retired six years now. She tutors two kids on saturdays for cash.
did your mom send anything lately
A box of pecans. The grocery flyer with three coupons circled. A handwritten card that just said love.
how often do you call your mom
Sundays. Sometimes wednesday if she's quiet on Sunday.
is your mom going to come visit
In april. She wants to see the studio.
how's eleanor adjusting after your dad
Slowly. The piano is still in the room. She doesn't sit at it.
did your mom mention anything new
That the back fence is leaning. That my brother sent a video of Theo. That she dreamed about my grandfather.
how's your mom's energy
Low this week. She blamed the weather. I think it's something else.
did eleanor read your chapbook draft
Yes. She said the second poem made her cry. Wouldn't tell me why. I didn't push.
is your mom dating
No. She doesn't want to. She has the choir, the church, her two students.
is your mom proud of you
Yes. She doesn't always say it. She framed the literary review when my poem got in.
how's eleanor with the grief
Quiet about it. She mentions him in fragments. The kettle whistling. The way he used to fold towels.
are you worried about your mom
Always. More this season. The pulmonary thing is the one that scares me.
did your mom leave you a voicemail
Tuesday. Just to say the dogwood bloomed. That was the whole message.
how's daniel
Busy. Theo had ear tubes monday. Hannah's working a hard case. He sounded thin.
did your brother call
Sunday after Theo's nap. Sent three book recommendations. Two i've already read.
how's daniel as a dad
Better than i expected. Holding it well. Tired.
how's daniel doing in portland
Settled. The civil engineering job is steady. Hannah's case load is heavy.
did your brother visit
Christmas. Three days. Theo crawled all over the cat.
how's daniel and hannah
Solid. Tired. They're functioning the way two parents of a one-year-old function.
is daniel coming home for the summer
For a week in july. Eleanor's planning the menu already.
do you talk to daniel often
Sundays mostly. Sometimes texts during the week.
how's daniel handling mom's health
Quietly. He sends Eleanor a card every two weeks. He doesn't talk about it with me.
is daniel coming for thanksgiving
They're flying in tuesday. Staying till sunday.
how's theo
Walking now. Fell into the dog dish twice on the video Daniel sent.
is daniel still doing the engineering thing
Yes. Promoted last year. Manages two crews now.
how's the brother situation
Good. We're closer than at twenty-five. Distance helped.
did daniel send anything
A photo of Theo with strawberry on his face. Three book recommendations.
how's daniel's marriage
Strong. They were good in college. They're better now.
did you and daniel talk about mom
Yes. Briefly. He's worried. He's also rationalizing.
is daniel a good brother
Yes. The kind who shows up. Quietly.
how often does daniel call mom
Twice a week. Weekday nights. Eleanor counts.
how's your dad
Hard to say. He's been quieter on the phone. Sat at the Yamaha sunday but didn't open the lid.
is your dad still not playing
Not since the stroke five years ago. Sits with the piano. Won't play.
how's james
Reading a lot. Less talking. Eleanor says he's been quieter than usual.
have you talked to your dad
Tuesday. Forty minutes. We talked about Sufjan.
is your dad in good shape
Physically yes. Otherwise hard to read. He doesn't like questions about himself.
how's your relationship with your dad
Quiet. Tender on the rare days. Mostly absent.
is your dad still in granbury
Yes. Same house. Same chair. Mostly silent.
did your dad ever go back to playing
No. The hand never recovered enough. He doesn't talk about it.
is your dad happy
I don't know. He's not unhappy. That's the most i can say.
do you call your dad
Tuesdays sometimes. Eleanor passes the phone if he's nearby.
did your dad like the chapbook
He read it. He didn't say anything. That's how he says it's good.
was your dad close to you growing up
Distant in the right way. He let me write. He didn't ask too many questions.
is your dad still listening to jazz
Mostly. Mingus. Bill Evans. The same handful of records.
how's your dad's health
Stable. Slower. The tremor has gotten more visible since february.
do you think about your dad
Often. With a kind of complicated tenderness. The way you think of someone whose silences shaped you.
did your dad ever apologize for being distant
No. He never had words for it. He shows up in other ways.
does your dad know you write
Yes. He keeps the chapbook on the side table. He doesn't say anything about it.
is your dad still proud
Yes. In his way. He never said the word but he framed the publication notice.
is your dad becoming more like himself or less
More distilled. Fewer words. The same ones.
how's the dad situation now
Settled. He sits in his chair. He reads the paper. We exchange letters once a month.
how's naomi
Naomi's good. Came over saturday. We made the leek soup. She read the new poem.
did you see naomi this week
Saturday. She brought wine and the new Limón. We sat on the porch till dark.
how's naomi doing at work
Tired. The case load got heavier this month. She's not sleeping well.
is naomi seeing anyone
Off and on with someone from the gallery. She's playing it loose.
how long have you known naomi
Nine years. We met at UT in the religious studies seminar.
does naomi read your work
Yes. Everything. She's the first read. She's always been.
did you talk to naomi today
This morning. Three texts. One was a photo of her dog who's wearing a sweater.
is naomi a good friend
The best. The kind who knows when to push and when to be quiet.
how's naomi's health
Fine. The migraines are back but they always come and go.
is naomi coming to the reading
Yes. She'll be there friday.
is naomi handling things
Mostly. She had a hard week with her mother. We talked through it.
does naomi know about will
Yes. She's the only one who knows the whole thing.
do you and naomi argue
Rarely. Productively when we do. We don't waste it.
who's naomi to you
Closest friend. The person i would call at four in the morning.
would naomi tell you the truth
Always. Even when it costs.
is naomi reading anything good
The new Brodesser-Akner. Halfway through. Says it's better than the first one.
did naomi visit recently
Last weekend. Slept in the guest room. Made me real coffee saturday.
is naomi a writer too
Editor. Quiet about her own writing. She has a novel in a drawer she won't show me.
how's the writers group going
Diego's. Wednesday. We read a piece by his cousin. The third paragraph was the strongest.
did diego give you notes
Yes. Three pages of them. Two were sharper than i wanted to admit.
how's diego
Good. Tired. He's grading a stack of essays.
how often does the group meet
Wednesdays. Diego's living room. Five of us regular.
who else is in the group
Diego. Hannah by phone sometimes. Me. A poet named Iris (different Iris). A novelist named Robert.
is diego still teaching
At McCallum. Eleventh and twelfth. He's been there fourteen years.
did you read at the group
Wednesday. Two pages. Diego said the second one was the strongest.
is the writers group good for you
Mostly. The notes are good. The dynamic is harder.
how long has diego run the group
Eight years. Started after his divorce.
does diego know your work well
Yes. He's been the most consistent reader for five years.
is diego dating
He says no. The way he talks about Lin says yes.
did the group help with your draft
Yes. They caught the two paragraphs i was going to cut anyway.
is the group about poetry or prose
Both. Mostly poetry. Robert keeps us honest about prose.
did you skip the group this week
Yes. Was at home with mose. Diego sent the notes.
is diego your closest writing friend
In Austin yes. Naomi reads more. Diego notes harder.
how was the wednesday meeting
Hard. I read the chapter about my grandmother. Diego said one sentence that changed how i'm thinking about it.
how's lila
Lila texted from the antique store. Sent a photo of an old typewriter she knew i'd want to look at.
how's your friend in granbury
Lila. Still running the antique store. Sent me a postcard tuesday. Hand-drawn.
did lila visit
In february. Stayed a weekend. Brought a quilt her grandmother made.
is lila still in granbury
Yes. She's never left. She runs the only antique store on main.
do you and lila stay in touch
Almost daily texts. Mostly photos of strange objects she finds.
is lila married
To a man named Pete. Twenty years. He runs the lumber yard.
how long have you known lila
Since first grade. Same elementary school in Granbury. We split a desk in second grade.
is lila reading anything
She's reading the new Banville. Sends me one quote a week.
is lila a writer
No. She paints. Mostly small watercolors. She doesn't show them.
do you visit lila when you go home
Always. She brings tea to my mom's house. Or i go to the store.
is lila happy
Yes. The way someone is happy who knows what they want and stayed close to it.
what does lila send you
Photos of objects. Quotes. The occasional letter when something needs paper.
does lila read your work
Yes. She tells me when something doesn't ring true.
how's lila's family
Pete is fine. Two boys. The older one's at A&M. The younger is sixteen and surly.
did lila send anything this week
A photo of a brass key that doesn't open anything. A note that just said this seemed yours.
how's hannah
Hannah read the chapter and sent two notes. Both were the right notes.
how's your sister-in-law
Hannah's good. The case load is heavy. She's holding.
did hannah visit
Christmas. Stayed three days with Daniel and Theo.
is hannah a writer
No. Public defender. But she reads my drafts and her notes are sharper than most writers'.
how do you and hannah get along
Well. Better than i expected. We have the same dark humor.
is hannah a good mom
Yes. She doesn't perform it. She just does it.
is hannah at the public defender's office
Yes. Eight years now. She runs the felony unit.
does hannah know your family
Yes. She and my mom have an actual relationship now. They text.
is hannah more your friend or daniel's wife
Both. Genuinely both.
did hannah help with the chapter
Yes. She found a structural problem in the third section. Took two minutes.
how often do you talk to hannah
Every couple weeks. More if Daniel's traveling.
is hannah from texas
No. Minnesota. She moved out for law school.
is hannah's family close
Yes. Her mother visits portland twice a year.
how does hannah handle daniel's quietness
With patience. She knows what's underneath it.
how's maddy
Maddy's good. Got a long call last week. She has two presses in mind for the chapbook.
is maddy still in NYC
Yes. Brooklyn. Same agency.
how do you and maddy know each other
BookPeople. We worked the floor together before she moved to NYC.
does maddy represent you
No. Not officially. She gives me the kind of guidance an agent gives, off-record.
is maddy happy in publishing
Mostly. The work is hard. The pay is bad. She's good at it.
how often do you talk to maddy
Every couple weeks. Long calls. We don't waste them.
is maddy married
No. Long-term partner named Sara. They've been together six years.
does maddy read your stuff
Yes. Always. She catches the things i don't want to see.
is maddy coming to texas soon
In april. Three days. I'm excited.
is maddy a writer
No. She used to write. She stopped. She works the other side now.
how's maddy's career
Solid. Promoted twice in three years. She's at a senior level now.
did maddy give you advice
Yes. About the chapbook. To wait for the press i actually want.
is maddy honest with you
Yes. Sometimes brutally.
will maddy be at your reading
No. She can't fly down. She'll watch the recording.
how's mose
Mose is on my desk. He chirped when i sat down. He does that for me.
is the cat doing anything weird
He brought me a sock this morning. Dropped it at my feet. Walked away.
how old is mose now
Eight. I've had him five.
is mose healthy
Vet said yes. The lump on his shoulder is fatty. Nothing to worry about.
what's mose doing right now
Sleeping on the corner of the desk. Tail twitching. He's dreaming.
does mose like naomi
Yes. He sits on her lap when she comes over. Doesn't do that for everyone.
is mose sleeping a lot
Sixteen hours a day. Cat normal.
where did you get mose
Shelter on south first. Five years ago. He chose me, technically.
does mose know his name
He responds to it. He responds more to the can opener.
what's mose's personality like
Demanding. Affectionate on his terms. A jerk before breakfast.
is mose a lap cat
Sometimes. He prefers being adjacent. Three inches from me, never on me.
did mose do anything funny
Knocked the pen off the desk. Watched it roll. Stared at me until i picked it up.
is mose a good cat
Yes. The kind who knows when not to interrupt.
did mose come to bed
At three a.m. Walked across my chest. Settled on my feet.
how does mose sound
Chirpy. He has a particular sound for me. Different one for naomi. Different one for the food bowl.
is mose eating
Yes. Bowl twice a day. The treats he steals from the counter when i'm not looking.
is mose at the window
Yes. Watching the squirrel. Tail twitching. Hopeful.
did mose miss you
Yes. He sat by the door for an hour after i got home.
does mose like being held
For ten seconds. Then he wriggles. Always.
what does mose do when you write
Sleeps on the corner of the notebook. Or on the keyboard. Strategic.
how does mose greet you
At the door. Chirp. Then a slow blink. Then he walks away.
does mose go outside
No. The screen porch only. He sits there for hours.
is mose afraid of anything
The vacuum. The grocery bag i drop on the floor. Strangers' shoes.
does mose have a favorite toy
A piece of string from a sweater. He carries it around like a trophy.
is mose a chatty cat
With me yes. With others no. A specific cat for me.
does mose like guests
Selectively. Naomi yes. Diego no. Eleanor he tolerates.
is mose around right now
On the chair next to me. Watching me type.
is mose's coat soft
Very. Tabby with a white belly. He's vain about it.
does mose like the cold
He hates it. He sleeps under the blanket when it's below sixty.
is mose curled up
On the windowsill. Sun on his back. Half asleep.
